trades.reasoning: RSI at 70.1 signals overbought territory and momentum score lags peers at 70 — rotating the +2.1% gain into a higher-conviction name while the market is risk-on.
Score 95 with RSI 64.5 sitting in the ideal bullish momentum zone (55–70), MACD crossover confirmed, and price well above SMA-20 — best risk/reward on the board today.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.5% and the S&P up 1.2%, lifting all three existing positions. META has crossed into overbought RSI territory and carries the weakest momentum score of our holdings, so we're locking in the 2.1% gain and rotating into AAPL, which offers a score-95 setup with RSI still in the sweet spot. COIN and TSLA remain strong holds with excellent momentum and room to run toward their 12% profit targets.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets rallied broadly on April 18 as investor sentiment shifted decidedly risk-on, with technology and growth names leading the charge. The NASDAQ outperformed the broader S&P 500, reflecting renewed appetite for higher-beta growth stocks after recent volatility subsided. Momentum indicators across top-tier tech — AAPL, TSLA, COIN — all confirmed bullish crossovers, suggesting institutional money is rotating back into equities.
market_education.summary_zh: 4月18日美股全面上漲，市場情緒明顯轉向風險偏好，科技及成長股領漲。納斯達克指數表現優於標普500，反映投資者在近期波動平息後重新增持高Beta成長股。蘋果、特斯拉、Coinbase等科技龍頭的動能指標均確認多頭交叉訊號，顯示機構資金正積極回流股市。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how fast a stock has moved up. When RSI crosses above 70, a stock is considered 'overbought' — it has risen quickly and may be due for a pause or pullback. Smart traders often take profits from overbought positions and rotate that capital into stocks with RSI still in the 55–70 'bullish momentum zone,' where there is more room to run before the next resistance.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價上漲的速度。當RSI升破70，代表股票「超買」——短期漲幅過快，可能面臨整理或回調壓力。有經驗的交易者往往會在此時獲利了結，將資金轉入RSI仍處於55至70「多頭動能區間」的標的，因為這類股票尚有較大的上行空間，尚未觸及超買警戒線。
